name: @salary-hijacking/scheduler
description: Salary Hijacking Cloudflare Workers scheduler service for server-authoritative payroll reminders, fixed-expense reminders, monthly hijack close, data-retention cleanup, Cron, Queue and operational automation.
author: Salary Hijacking Platform

scripts.dev: corepack pnpm exec wrangler dev --local --persist-to ../../.wrangler/state --config wrangler.toml
scripts.preview: corepack pnpm exec wrangler dev --remote --config wrangler.toml
scripts.build: corepack pnpm run clean:dist && corepack pnpm run typecheck && corepack pnpm run build:js && node ../../scripts/build/fix-esm-imports.mjs && corepack pnpm run build:verify
scripts.build:verify: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); for (const f of ['dist/index.js','dist/index.d.ts','dist/jobs/payday-reminder.job.js','dist/jobs/payday-reminder.job.d.ts','dist/jobs/fixed-expense-reminder.job.js','dist/jobs/fixed-expense-reminder.job.d.ts','dist/jobs/monthly-hijack-close.job.js','dist/jobs/monthly-hijack-close.job.d.ts','dist/jobs/data-retention-cleanup.job.js','dist/jobs/data-retention-cleanup.job.d.ts']) if (!fs.existsSync(f)) throw new Error('missing '+f); console.log('scheduler build verified')"
scripts.test:qa: corepack pnpm run typecheck:strict && corepack pnpm run test:unit && corepack pnpm run test:integration && corepack pnpm run test:e2e && corepack pnpm run privacy:check && corepack pnpm run security:scan
scripts.quality: corepack pnpm run format:check && corepack pnpm run lint && corepack pnpm run test:qa
scripts.ci: corepack pnpm run clean && corepack pnpm run quality && corepack pnpm run build
scripts.privacy:check: node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); const text=JSON.stringify(pkg); for (const marker of ['server-authoritative-scheduler','raw-financial-data-not-logged','raw-push-token-not-logged','ads-financial-targeting-forbidden']) if(!text.includes(marker)) throw new Error('privacy marker missing: '+marker); console.log('scheduler privacy contract ok')"
scripts.wrangler:types: corepack pnpm exec wrangler types src/worker-configuration.d.ts --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm exec wrangler deploy --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:staging: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm exec wrangler deploy --env staging --config wrangler.toml
scripts.deploy:production: corepack pnpm run build && corepack pnpm exec wrangler deploy --env production --config wrangler.toml
scripts.tail: corepack pnpm exec wrangler tail --config wrangler.toml
scripts.doctor: node --version && corepack pnpm --version && corepack pnpm exec wrangler --version && corepack pnpm run typecheck:strict && corepack pnpm run privacy:check
